project_info.name: Cruise Terminal 5 — Non-Cruise-Day Program
project_info.owner: Tampa Port Authority d/b/a Port Tampa Bay
project_info.anchor_days: Mondays & Tuesdays reliably clear even in peak cruise season
project_info.note: Excludes parking garage (~240,000 SF) and exterior/site areas. Same physical footprint as cruise-day program — all spaces converted or held fixed.

program_mode_description: Terminal converts to a multi-use civic asset generating revenue and serving the community. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, and clear-span structure enable full conversion of embarkation and debarkation zones. Building systems, vertical circulation, and select operations spaces remain fixed.

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Event Reception / Registration Hall
space_library.description: Event reception / registration hall; conference registration; market hall entry

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Open Event Floor (Security Zone Absorbed)
space_library.description: Absorbed into open event floor; screening equipment stored or retracted behind demountable partitions

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Premier Event Hall
space_library.description: Premier event hall: galas, conferences, trade shows, weddings, banquets ($15K–$50K+/event)

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Private Event Suite
space_library.description: Private event suite: corporate retreats, board meetings, rehearsal dinners, fundraisers, brand activations

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Public-Facing Restaurant / Café / Market
space_library.description: Public-facing restaurant / café / market serving Channel District via dual-access storefronts
space_library.note: Designed for continuous operation regardless of cruise schedule

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Community Wellness Room
space_library.description: Community wellness room: yoga classes, meditation, neighborhood meetings, small group sessions

space_library.logic_rule: Upper-level hall becomes premier event venue. Demountable kiosks, retractable barriers, clear-span structure enable full conversion.
space_library.name: Waterside Terrace / Viewing Gallery
space_library.description: Waterside terrace / viewing gallery with harbor panorama; cocktail reception overflow

space_library.logic_rule: Ground-level debark zone (~16,000 SF) converts to indoor recreation and community event space.
space_library.name: Secondary Service Access (Closed)
space_library.description: Secondary service access or closed; no public function on non-cruise days

space_library.logic_rule: Ground-level debark zone (~16,000 SF) converts to indoor recreation and community event space.
space_library.name: Indoor Recreation / Fitness Events
space_library.description: Indoor recreation: pickleball courts, volleyball pop-ups, fitness events; demountable FIS partitions retract
design_enablers: Sports-grade flooring (sealed concrete or sport court overlay)
Demountable FIS partitions on track systems

space_library.logic_rule: Ground-level debark zone (~16,000 SF) converts to indoor recreation and community event space.
space_library.name: Large-Format Community Events
space_library.description: Large-format community events: health fairs, blood drives, indoor markets, maker fairs; claim devices retract flat
design_enablers: Retractable or fold-flat baggage claim devices

space_library.logic_rule: Ground-level debark zone (~16,000 SF) converts to indoor recreation and community event space.
space_library.name: Maritime History Exhibit / Art Gallery
space_library.description: Maritime history exhibit / rotating art gallery; interpretive displays for walk-in visitors

space_library.description: Event staging / setup area; large-format deliveries; food truck commissary support

program_summary.note: Excludes parking garage (~240,000 SF) and exterior/site areas. Same total area as cruise-day program — all spaces are 1:1 mapped conversions.

full_conversion.description: Complete functional transformation; cruise equipment stored, retracted, or removed

partial_conversion.description: Function shifts but some cruise infrastructure remains in place

fixed.description: No conversion; same function or secured/locked

plan_archetypes.notes: Bar layout adaptable for events and community use

space_sequences.name: Event Attendee Arrival
space_sequences.description: Public event flow: reception/registration → open event floor → premier hall or private suite. Visitors may move freely between event spaces after registration.

space_sequences.name: Private Event Suite Path
space_sequences.description: Branch for private event suite guests after registration.

space_sequences.name: Restaurant / Café Visitor
space_sequences.description: Public dining: reception → restaurant/café. May combine with event attendance or be standalone destination.

space_sequences.name: Community Program Visitor
space_sequences.description: Community wellness, recreation, and cultural programs on both levels. Registration → wellness/recreation/exhibit → meditation.

space_sequences.name: Event Load-In / Setup
space_sequences.description: Back-of-house logistics: load-in dock → staging area → vendor overflow → event floor. Must not cross public visitor paths during events.

space_sequences.name: Event Staff Circulation
space_sequences.description: Staff circulation connecting management, production, crew break, and service areas. Separated from public flows.
